steps.instruction: We will count backward from 15. That means starting at 15 and going down by 1 each time.
steps.explanation: Counting backward from bigger numbers works the same way — subtract 1 each time.
The teen numbers go backward just like small numbers: 15, 14, 13, 12, 11.
Once you pass 10, the numbers are ones you already know from counting backward from 10.

title: Finding a Missing Number Counting Backward

steps.instruction: Look at this sequence: 18, 17, ___, 15, 14. A number is missing.
steps.explanation: We need to find what goes in the blank.

steps.subgoalLabel: Count backward to find the gap
steps.instruction: Start at 18 and count backward: 18, 17... what comes next?
Put 16 in the blank and read the whole sequence.
steps.explanation: The sequence is correct. Each number is one less than the last.
